notes.determinism: two same-seed evolve runs; 0 = identical archive (ADR-075)
notes.fdr: BH on true-null uniform p-values; controlled iff empirical ≤ q (validates ADR-096)
notes.nicheEntropy: Shannon entropy of behavioural niches (ADR-091); higher = less monoculture
notes.adaptationLatency: null = requires a graded multi-difficulty benchSuite (ADR-097)
